title: pillowy nutty applesauce bake
description: nutty, pillowy brunch-mood polish dish featuring applesauce, pressure-cooker and low-fat-friendly ingredients
instructions: mix together 2 cups whole wheat flour, 1 cup oats, 1 tsp baking powder, 0.5 tsp salt, and 1 tsp vanilla extract
add 1 cup applesauce, 1/2 cup low-fat milk, and 1 large egg to the dry ingredients
stir until combined, do not overmix
pour batter into a greased 6-inch round cake pan
place the cake pan in the pressure-cooker and cook for 12 minutes
let the pressure release naturally for 5 minutes
remove the cake pan from the pressure-cooker and let it cool for 2 minutes
optional: top with a dollop of whipped cream or a sprinkle of cinnamon
